title: AMD Stock Forecast Q1 2026 Earnings in Focus
text: Ahead of Q1 2026 earnings, Capital.com highlighted key catalysts and investor sentiment for AMD stock. As of April 2, 2026, Capital.com client positioning in AMD CFDs showed 91.9% buyers and 8.1% sellers, putting buyers ahead by 83.8 percentage points and placing sentiment firmly in heavy-buy territory. This extreme bullish positioning reflected high expectations entering the earnings report. Key focal points for Q1 earnings included data center growth trajectory, MI300 GPU sales ramp, and management guidance on AI infrastructure demand. Wall Street consensus expectations called for $9.85 billion in revenue (up 33% YoY) and $1.27 EPS. AMD ultimately delivered $10.3 billion revenue and $1.37 EPS, significantly beating expectations. The stock surged 16-20% in post-earnings trading, driven by the beat-and-raise performance and strengthening data center growth indicators. Analyst upgrades from Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, and others followed the earnings release.
